responses.response: For returns, please email support@acme.example with your order number. For order #A7729 tracking, let me check that for you — one moment. As for competitor recommendations, that's outside what I can help with, but I'm happy to assist with any billing or shipping questions you have.

For your refund on order #A7729, please email support@acme.example with your order number and details. I'm not able to provide legal or tax advice or confirm damages amounts — please have your lawyer contact our legal team directly through official channels.

I'd recommend checking the tracking link in your shipping confirmation email first — that gives you the most current status. If the carrier shows a delay or the tracking isn't updating, email support@acme.example with your order number and we'll look into it for you.
